PUPPET_FILE
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# actual example from the https://youtrack.jetbrains.com/issue/RUBY-18036')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  Puppet: CLASS_DEFINITION
    PsiElement(CLASS)('class')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetFqnContainerImpl(FQN_CONTAINER)
      Puppet: NAMESPACE_DEFINITION
        PsiElement(NAME)('profile')
      PsiElement(::)('::')
      PsiElement(NAME)('test')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetParenthesizedParametersListBlockImpl(PARENTHESIZED_PARAMETERS_LIST_BLOCK)
      PsiElement(()('(')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiErrorElement:'Struct' unexpected
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Struct')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
        PsiWhiteSpace('                   ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Enum')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement(NAME)('read')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(NAME)('write')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(NAME)('update')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiElement(NAME)('path')
        PsiWhiteSpace('                   ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(DUMMY_BLOCK)
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n    ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')
        PsiElement([)('[')
        PsiElement(NAME)('owner')
        PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
        PsiElement(=>)('=>')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
        PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
      PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
      PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiElement(])(']')
      PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('foo')
      PsiElement(,)(',')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement())(')')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetBracedStatementsBlockImpl(BRACED_STATEMENTS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement({)('{')
      PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
      PsiElement(})('}')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiComment(COMMENT)('# examples from docs: https://docs.puppet.com/puppet/4.6/reference/lang_data_abstract.html#struct')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Struct')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Enum')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('read')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('write')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('update')
              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('path')
          PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Struct')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Enum')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('read')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('write')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('update')
              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('path')
          PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
                PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
                PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
                  PsiElement([)('[')
                  PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
                  PsiElement(])(']')
              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Struct')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')
      PsiPuppetHashValueImpl(HASH_VALUE)
        PsiElement({)('{')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('mode')
          PsiWhiteSpace('            ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Enum')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('read')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('write')
              PsiElement(,)(',')
              PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('update')
              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
            PsiElement(NAME)('path')
          PsiWhiteSpace('                   ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
                PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
                PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)

                    PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
                  PsiElement(])(']')
              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('owner')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetExpressionNumericImpl(EXPRESSION_NUMERIC)
                PsiElement(INTEGER_LITERAL_WITHOUTQ)('1')
              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
        PsiElement(})('}')
      PsiElement(])(']')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n\n')
  PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
    PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
      PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Struct')
    PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
      PsiElement([)('[')

              PsiElement(])(']')
        PsiElement(,)(',')
        PsiWhiteSpace('\n  ')
        PsiPuppetHashPairImpl(HASH_PAIR)
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('NotUndef')
            PsiPuppetDataTypeParametersBlockImpl(DATA_TYPE_PARAMETERS_BLOCK)
              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetRegularNameWrapperImpl(REGULAR_NAME_WRAPPER)
                PsiElement(NAME)('owner')
              PsiElement(])(']')
          PsiWhiteSpace('        ')
          PsiElement(=>)('=>')
          PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
          PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
            PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
              PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('Optional')

              PsiElement([)('[')
              PsiPuppetDataTypeImpl(DATA_TYPE)
                PsiPuppetCapitalizedNameWrapperImpl(CAPITALIZED_NAME_WRAPPER)
                  PsiElement(CAPITALIZED_NAME)('String')
